name: Moon Dance Ritual
name_jp: ムーンダンスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>式</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card by targeting 1 WIND Xyz Monster you control that has no Xyz Materials. While that monster is on the field, negate the effects of all face-up monsters on the field. When that monster leaves the field, destroy this card. During the End Phase of the turn this card was activated: Attach this card to that monster as an Xyz Material.
eff: Activate this card by targeting 1 WIND Xyz Monster you control that has no Xyz Materials. While that monster is on the field, negate the effects of all face-up monsters on the field. When that monster leaves the field, destroy this card. During the End Phase of the turn this card was activated: Attach this card to that monster as an Xyz Material.

action: Attaches itself from your field as Xyz Material
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
